title: Bringe

Originally a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] in the [[Alopia Rift]], '''Bringe''' was forced to wear an articulated environment suit after an accident damaged his body and removed his ability to breathe at standard [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] pressure. Unable to mine, Bringe took to the dangerous work of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. Based in [[Aquarius]] and [[Foamwander City]], Bringe plied [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] aboard [[Bathysphere (starship)|''Bathysphere'']] in search of work.

Shortly after the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Bringe accepted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Guarran]], which he spent [[Standard year/Legends|years]] plotting.
